triggers: Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Jul 16 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.

picks.analysis: CLS scores +14 — a Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+7), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +70.1%), Sector Narrative (+2, tailwind). Cutting the other way: MACD (-1, -4.15). Within Technology, the next-closest same-direction peer is SMCI at +17 — well below CLS's +14 (CLS leads on Fundamentals (+7 vs +6)), so CLS is the cleaner calls expression. The suggested calls sit ~19.6% OTM with 49d to expiry, delta 0.29, mid $14.70 — well inside the 5-35% OTM / Δ 0.10-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

picks.thesis: Bullish setup on GD: Positive Catalyst (bullish) — news sentiment bullish; Guidance (+7.7%) — +7.7% FY EPS growth est — raised/in-line proxy; Streak (3d green) — +3.0% cumulative; Sector Narrative (tailwind) — rides "Aerospace & Defense Spending" (str 75); Earnings Surprise (+11.0%) — 2026-03-31 — actual 4.1 vs est 3.69302; EPS Growth YoY (+12.0%); Revenue Growth YoY (+10.3%); Analyst Price Target (+12% to $392.22) — 21 analysts.

drivers.text: Guidance (+7.7%) — +7.7% FY EPS growth est — raised/in-line proxy

takeProfit.reason: No resistance far enough above to bank into — target $394.57 (+13.1%), the chain's 1σ expected move by expiry. That's where the option has gained real value; beyond it you're betting on an outlier.

cut.reason: Reduce/exit on a close below $333.29 — losing 20-day support breaks the bullish setup that drove the call (thesis invalidated). Cut before theta compounds the loss.

pillars.label: Fundamental
pillars.reason: Earnings land on 2026-07-22 before expiry — a miss or lowered guidance can gap the stock against you and crush IV even when the direction is right. Exit or roll past the print.

pillars.label: Technical
pillars.reason: A daily close below $333.29 (the cut level) breaks the structure driving the call — that's where the chart says the move is over. Don't hold a long call under broken support.

pillars.label: Mechanical
pillars.reason: Options flow is the early warning. Today's put/call is 1.52. A flip toward heavy put buying (P/C pushing back above 1.25) or fresh put open interest stacking up means smart money is hedging — exit into it instead of waiting for the chart.

pillars.label: Narrative
pillars.reason: The trade leans on the "Aerospace & Defense Spending" sector narrative (currently a tailwind). If it flips into a headwind, the catalyst behind the position is gone — exit on the narrative shift, not the chart.

triggers: Exit before earnings (2026-07-22): the post-report IV crush can erase a long premium even when the direction is right.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Sep 17 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.

picks.analysis: GD scores +16 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+6), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +7.7%), Streak (+2, 3d green). Cutting the other way: Support/Resistance (-1, ±1.3% to R), Short Interest % (-1, 1.1%). Within Industrials we gave GD a +16 and RDW a +15 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take GD calls over RDW calls, mainly on Technicals (+3 vs +0) and Fundamentals (+6 vs +4). The suggested calls sit ~8.9% OTM with 112d to expiry, delta 0.32, mid $7.15 — well inside the 5-35% OTM / Δ 0.10-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
